gpa_range:
General: 75-85
Program-specific (regular admission):
Nursing 1-2-1 = min 88 (w/ test scores - 1080 SAT, 22 ACT), min 90 (w/o test scores)
PA = 90 w/test scores (1170 SAT/24 ACT); 94 (w/o test scores)
PT = 88 (SAT 1080/ACT 22).

HEOP-eligible applicants to these programs may be denied from the program and offered HEOP consideration. They then enter Daemen as B.A. or B.S. Nursing Exploration, Biology, or Natural Sciences majors. Once the student maintains the GPA requirements for the program of their choice, they are then able to declare Nursing, PA, or PT at the professional phase of the program sequence.
adm_options: RD, Rolling. Students are waitlisted for HEOP AD to review application, supporting documentation, and send invitation to interview
